name: Cellars Hill Wind Farm
operational_notes: CIS T7 award May 2026 (341 MW wind). JV between Gamuda Renewables Australia (subsidiary of Malaysian Gamuda Berhad) and Alternate Path (Tasmanian developer). Located Highland Lakes Rd near Bothwell, Central Highlands, ~1hr from Hobart. Shares site + 220 kV connection with sister Weasel Solar Farm (also T7 win, existing AURES overlay weasel-solar-farm-and-bess-kci). Both projects delivered via Gamuda Engineering EPC contract. Construction target 2028 (Weasel first, early 2027). Only two Tasmanian T7 projects. Created 2026-07-18 to close v3.22.2 data gap.

timeline.title: CIS Tender 7 award (341 MW)
timeline.detail: Awarded CIS Tender 7 — NEM Generation. One of only two Tasmanian T7 projects.

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Gamuda + Alternate Path JV. Shares site + 220 kV connection with sister Weasel Solar. Both delivered via Gamuda Engineering EPC. Construction target 2028 (Weasel first, early 2027). Pre-CISA at ~2 months.

sources.title: Gamuda press release — CIS T7 award (May 2026)
